productName: Seattle Bubble Works Hash Blunt - Blue Dream (S) - 3g
description: A hybrid blunt of Blue Dream taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
